infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VIGIL AI needs camera access to capture emergency photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VIGIL AI needs photo library access to attach media to reports.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VIGIL AI needs your location to pin emergency reports accurately.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VIGIL AI needs microphone access for voice emergency input.

plugins.photosPermission: VIGIL AI needs access to your photos to attach them to emergency reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: VIGIL AI needs camera access to capture emergency evidence.
